case_number: Criminal Bail Appln. No. S-468 of 2025

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Bail Appln. No. S-468 of 2025 Applicants: 1. Zulfiqar @ Kashif 2. Zubair @ Zubair Ahmed 3. Shahbaz Through Mr. Atta Hussain Qadri, advocate Complainant Ashique Ali Dayo (In person) The State: Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhangwar, D.P.G for the State Date of hearing 08-09-2025 Date of order 08-09-2025 O R D E R SHAMSUDDIN ABBASI, J.- Through instant criminal bail application, applicants/accused Zulfiqar @ Kashif, Zubair @ Zubair Ahmed and Shahbaz, seek interim pre-arrest bail in Crime No. 25/2025 of P.S. Garhi Yasin for the offence U/s 302, 324, 34 P.P.C, after rejection of their bail plea by learned trial court vide order dated 19.08.2025. 2. At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicants submits that complainant and eye witnesses have sworn their affidavits before this court by exonerating the applicants from commission of offence, hence their case requires further inquiry. 3. Learned D.P.G. has recorded his no objection on the ground that complainant party has not supported the prosecution case. 4. Today the complainant of this case Ashique Ali Dayo and eye witness Mst. Akhtiar and Altaf have sworn their affidavits before this court by exonerating the applicants by stating that they could not identify the accused due to odd hours of the night and under suspicion they lodged the F.I.R and the applicants are innocent and are not involved in this case. 2 Cr. Bail Appln. No. S-468 of 2025 (Zulfiqar @ Kashif and others Vs. The State) 5. The statements of complainant and eye-witnesses by exonerating the applicants from the commission of offence make out their case for grant of pre-arrest bail. 6.

The State) 5. The statements of complainant and eye-witnesses by exonerating the applicants from the commission of offence make out their case for grant of pre-arrest bail. 6. In view of above position, instant bail application is allowed. Interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicants vide order dated 25.08.2025 is confirmed on same terms and conditions. J U D G E Abdul Salam/P.A
